{{Short description|2005 film festival in Berlin, Germany}} {{Use dmy dates|date=January 2025}} {{Infobox Film festival | name = 55th Berlin International Film Festival | image = 55BIFFPoster.jpg | caption = Festival poster | opening = ''[[Man to Man (2005 film)|Man to Man]]'' | closing = ''[[Kinsey (film)|Kinsey]]'' | location = [[Berlin]], Germany | founded = 1951 | awards = [[Golden Bear]]:
''[[U-Carmen eKhayelitsha]]'' | host = [[Anke Engelke]] | number = 312 films | date = 10–20 February 2005 | website = [http://www.berlinale.de Website] | chronology = Berlin International Film Festival | preceded_by = [[54th Berlin International Film Festival|54th]] | followed_by = [[56th Berlin International Film Festival|56th]] }} The '''55th''' annual '''Berlin International Film Festival''' was held from 10 to 20 February 2005.{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2005/01_jahresblatt_2005/01_Jahresblatt_2005.html |title=55TH BERLIN INTERNATIONAL FILM FESTIVAL FEBRUARY 10 – 20, 2005 |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131104212716/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2005/01_jahresblatt_2005/01_Jahresblatt_2005.html| archive-date=4 November 2013 | url-status= live}} ''[[Man to Man (2005 film)|Man to Man]]'' by [[Régis Wargnier]] served as opening night film.{{cite news|url=https://www.theguardian.com/film/2005/feb/10/berlinfilmfestival2005.festivals |title=In brief: Berlin festival celebrates European film |newspaper=The Guardian |date=10 February 2005 |access-date=10 June 2014}} The festival closed with ''[[Kinsey (film)|Kinsey]]'' by [[Bill Condon]].{{cite web|url=http://www.dw.de/berlin-film-festival-set-for-scandal/a-1475449 |title=Berlin Film Festival Set for Scandal |access-date=10 June 2014}} The [[Golden Bear]] was awarded to ''[[U-Carmen eKhayelitsha]]'' directed by [[Mark Dornford-May]]. The retrospective was dedicated to the [[Film crew|scene formers]]. It was titled ''Production Design + Film. Locations, Settings, Spaces'' and was divided into five sections and a total of 45 films were shown at the festival.{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/retrospektive/index.html#|title=RETROSPECTIVE|access-date=28 August 2014|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170304113847/http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/retrospektive/index.html|archive-date=4 March 2017|url-status=dead}}
